# `!zypper`

**Category:** packages

Manage packages with zypper (openSUSE/SUSE). Uses zypper search --details for version comparison.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `package` | string | yes | Package name. |
| `version` | string | no | Pin a specific version (name=version). |
| `update` | bool | no | Use zypper update semantics. |
| `remove` | bool | no | Remove the package (zypper remove). |

## Examples

```yaml
- !zypper
  package: curl
  version: 8.3.0
  update: true
```
